coverage: 100% of reachable node types, including bundled G_Center Geometry and G_Implicit Geometry helpers.
validation: All eight authored, size, seam, height, animated-lid, and split-pin cases match Blender topology exactly. Authored output is 90,928 / 87,165 and split-pin output is 83,154 / 79,693. Seven cases retain bounds within 0.0001; the animated lid is within 0.0011 after Set Position moves its mixed mesh/instance components. Dense open-shell Exact Booleans retain Blender's collinear panel boundary samples, and concave wall profiles are ear-clipped for a clean Blender-matching silhouette.
